hero.headline: Investment in Transformation
hero.sub: Transparent pricing for high-impact results. Choose the path that fits your scale.

tiers.name: Service Pro
tiers.description: Perfect for local service providers needing a professional ongoing presence.
tiers.cardDescription: For local service businesses that need a credible Webflow site and light monthly updates — without CRM automation.

whoItsFor.intro: Service Pro is built for owners who need a professional web presence and occasional updates — not a full marketing automation stack.
idealFor: Local service providers (consultants, coaches, trades, studios)
Nonprofits and ministries with clear donation or contact goals
App or product launches that need a focused landing page
Businesses that already handle follow-up manually or via email
notIdealFor: You need missed-call text-back, CRM pipelines, or review automation
You want a Shopify store with product catalog management
You need weekly content shoots included in the same retainer

process.title: How a Service Pro build works

steps.name: Discovery call
steps.description: We clarify your offer, audience, and pages needed — usually up to 5 on Webflow.

steps.name: Strategy + wireframe
steps.description: Structure and conversion paths are mapped before design starts.

steps.name: Design + build
steps.description: Mobile-first Webflow build with forms, SEO basics, and your brand applied.

steps.name: Launch + handoff
steps.description: Site goes live in your Webflow account with CMS training and 2 free revisions within 30 days.

steps.name: Optional monthly care
steps.description: Queued updates, form monitoring, and quarterly SEO checks — or pause anytime.

caseStudies.headline: B2B service credibility
caseStudies.whyMatch: Clean Webflow site for a digital services brand — professional presence without e-commerce complexity.

caseStudies.headline: Nonprofit mission clarity
caseStudies.whyMatch: Service Pro scope: clear story, contact paths, and trust-building for a global ministry.

caseStudies.headline: App landing clarity
caseStudies.whyMatch: Focused landing page that explains an on-demand service app without a full automation stack.

oneTimeIncludes: Up to 5 pages in your Webflow account
Lead capture forms wired to email
monthlyIncludes: 2 queued site updates per month (~2–3 day turnaround)
CMS support in your Webflow account
notIncluded: Custom logo or brand identity design

tiers.name: Growth
tiers.description: Advanced features and integrations for scaling businesses and restaurants.
tiers.cardDescription: For restaurants and scaling service brands that want leads captured, booked, and followed up automatically via GoHighLevel.

whoItsFor.intro: Growth pairs a conversion-focused Webflow site with a managed GoHighLevel sub-account — so leads don't sit in an inbox while you're busy running the business.
idealFor: Restaurants and hospitality with booking and review goals
Service businesses tired of DM and email ping-pong
Brands running ads that need a real landing page + follow-up
Teams that want CRM, missed-call text-back, and review requests handled
notIdealFor: You only need a simple brochure site with no automations
You need Shopify product catalog and checkout management
You want cinematic video production every month (see Content Pro)

steps.name: Discovery + automation map
steps.description: We define your offer, lead paths, and which GHL workflows matter most.

steps.name: Webflow build
steps.description: Conversion layouts, booking flows, and CRM-ready forms in your Webflow account.

steps.name: GoHighLevel setup
steps.description: SWFT configures your sub-account: pipelines, text-back, reviews, and booking.

steps.name: Launch + test
steps.description: End-to-end test from form submit to follow-up — with 2 free revisions within 30 days.

steps.name: Monthly optimization
steps.description: Performance snapshot, workflow tweaks, and site updates on your monthly plan.

caseStudies.headline: Automation-ready ministry outreach
caseStudies.whyMatch: Website plus email and outreach automation for a growing nonprofit.

caseStudies.headline: Creator → owned platform
caseStudies.whyMatch: Lead capture, booking pathways, and brand home for a fitness creator audience.

caseStudies.headline: Entertainment lead gen
caseStudies.whyMatch: High-energy brand site with inquiry flows for a live entertainment business.

monthlyIncludes: Dedicated GoHighLevel sub-account managed by SWFT
notIncluded: SMS/phone usage beyond fair-use caps (billed at cost or quoted)
Custom logo or full brand identity

tiers.name: E-Commerce
tiers.description: Full managed online store support and continuous optimization.
tiers.cardDescription: For product brands on Shopify who need a managed storefront plus post-purchase SMS and review automation.

whoItsFor.intro: E-Commerce is for brands selling products online who want Shopify built right — and ongoing merchandising, monitoring, and customer follow-up without hiring in-house.
idealFor: CPG, kitchen, lifestyle, and drinkware brands on Shopify
Retailers migrating from marketplace-only to owned DTC
Stores that need catalog architecture and checkout optimization
Brands that want SMS follow-up and review automation post-purchase
notIdealFor: You don't sell products online (see Service Pro or Growth)
You need only a link-in-bio or single landing page
You want paid ad management included (quoted separately)

steps.name: Discovery + catalog plan
steps.description: Product hierarchy, collections, and conversion goals defined upfront.

steps.name: Shopify storefront build
steps.description: Custom theme work, mobile product presentation, and checkout flow in your account.

steps.name: GoHighLevel tie-in
steps.description: SMS follow-up, review requests, and customer communication workflows.

steps.name: Launch + QA
steps.description: Full purchase path tested; 2 free revisions within 30 days of launch.

steps.name: Monthly store care
steps.description: Product updates, merchandising tweaks, app monitoring, and health reports.

caseStudies.whyMatch: Owned storefront with social shopping integration for a hydration brand.

contentCreation.label: Content Creation
contentCreation.monthlyOnlyNote: Content plans are monthly retainers. Book a discovery call to scope a one-off content day.

tiers.name: Content Starter
tiers.description: Monthly essential photos and updates to keep your social feeds fresh.
tiers.cardDescription: For businesses that need fresh photos and post-ready social assets every month without a full production crew.

whoItsFor.intro: Content Starter keeps your feeds active with a half-day shoot and edited deliverables — ideal when you have a site but social goes stale between campaigns.
idealFor: Local businesses posting 3–5× per week
Brands that need photos + Canva templates, not full video crews
Teams aligning website hero images with social content
Owners who want assets delivered ready to post
notIdealFor: You need multiple reels per week and cinematic video
You want a full rebrand or custom logo (see Content Pro or separate quote)
You need paid ad management included

process.title: How Content Starter works each month

steps.name: Content brief
steps.description: We align on themes, locations, and what your site and social need this month.

steps.name: Half-day shoot
steps.description: On-site or studio session focused on web + social-ready shots.

steps.name: Edit + templates
steps.description: 10–15 edited photos plus 4–6 Canva social/ad templates in your brand.

steps.name: Delivery
steps.description: Assets sized for web and social with caption starters — ready to publish.

steps.name: Repeat monthly
steps.description: Same rhythm each month; pause or upgrade to Growth when you need video.

caseStudies.headline: Social-aligned fitness brand
caseStudies.whyMatch: Website and curated social content for a trainer building an owned audience.

caseStudies.headline: Seasonal product content
caseStudies.whyMatch: Lifestyle imagery supporting a drinkware brand's storefront and social channels.

monthlyIncludes: 1 half-day shoot per month (or equivalent photo batch)
10–15 edited photos sized for web + social
4–6 Canva-based social/ad templates customized to your brand
Professional retouching and fast edit turnaround
notIncluded: Custom logo or full brand identity

tiers.name: Content Growth
tiers.description: Comprehensive photo and short-form video system for active brands.
tiers.cardDescription: For active brands that need a full shoot day, reels, and a monthly content calendar — not just photos.

whoItsFor.intro: Content Growth is a full production day each month — photo, short-form video, and calendar planning for brands posting consistently across channels.
idealFor: Restaurants, studios, and entertainment brands posting reels weekly
Businesses running Meta or Google ads that need fresh creative
Teams that want a content calendar, not ad-hoc shoots
Brands upgrading from photo-only to photo + video systems
notIdealFor: You only need a few photos per month (Content Starter fits better)
You need quarterly cinematic hero films (see Content Pro)
You want website builds included (see Bundle or website tiers)

process.title: How Content Growth works each month

steps.name: Calendar planning
steps.description: Themes, campaigns, and shoot list aligned to your marketing calendar.

steps.name: Full shoot day
steps.description: Photo + short-form video captured in one coordinated session.

steps.name: Edit + motion
steps.description: 6–8 reels, 20+ deliverables, ad creative sets, light motion graphics.

steps.name: Review + delivery
steps.description: Organized asset drop with sizes for web, social, and ads.

steps.name: Iterate monthly
steps.description: Performance-informed adjustments to themes and formats.

caseStudies.whyMatch: Photo and video supporting a live entertainment brand's web and campaigns.

caseStudies.headline: Reels-forward studio
caseStudies.whyMatch: Portfolio and production brand built around short-form video output.

tiers.cardDescription: For brands that need cinematic hero video, two shoot days, and campaign-level asset packages every month.

idealFor: Brands launching major campaigns or seasonal collections
Video-first businesses (studios, entertainment, premium DTC)
Teams that need priority turnaround and campaign packages

bundle.name: Website + Content Starter Package
bundle.description: The complete entry package for businesses serious about showing up online. A Service Pro website build paired with ongoing Content Starter production so your site and social stay aligned.
bundle.cardDescription: For owners ready to launch a professional site and keep social content in sync from day one — website build plus monthly content retainer.

whoItsFor.intro: The bundle is the fastest path to looking legit online and staying visible — one setup fee covers your Service Pro website; Content Starter keeps feeds fresh every month.
idealFor: New businesses launching site + social together
Local brands tired of mismatched website and Instagram aesthetics
Owners who want one team handling web and monthly content
Fitness, food, and service brands in Jersey City / NYC area
notIdealFor: You only need a website with no ongoing content
You need Shopify e-commerce (see E-Commerce tier)
You need daily video production (see Content Growth or Pro)

steps.name: Discovery call
steps.description: We scope website pages and first-month content themes together.

steps.name: Website build
steps.description: Service Pro Webflow build — up to 5 pages, forms, SEO, launch.

steps.name: First content shoot
steps.description: Half-day session producing photos and templates aligned with the new site.

steps.name: Launch aligned

steps.name: Monthly rhythm

bookCta.headline: Let's Put Your Business on Autopilot.
bookCta.quote: Ready to stand out and get noticed? — Elombe
bookCta.sub: Stop managing tasks and start scaling impact. Book your strategic session today.

faq.a: GoHighLevel automations are included on Growth ($400/mo) and E-Commerce ($500/mo) website plans only. Service Pro ($200/mo) is website management without GHL. You can upgrade from the bundle or Service Pro anytime.

faq.q: What does monthly website management include?
faq.a: Service Pro covers site updates, monitoring, and CMS support. Growth and E-Commerce add a managed GoHighLevel sub-account with missed-call text-back, CRM pipeline, review automation, and booking flows.

All content plans are monthly retainers with shoots, edited photos/video, and Canva-based social assets. Custom logos and full brand identity are not included on Starter — they're available on Content Pro or as a separate quote.
The Website + Content Starter Package is $1,200 setup (Service Pro website build) + $600/mo (Content Starter retainer). Add Growth automations for +$200/mo on top of your website plan.

faq.q: Do I need the monthly plan?
faq.a: No. One-time website builds hand off with full CMS access in your Webflow or Shopify account. Monthly is for owners who want ongoing updates, monitoring, and support without doing it themselves.
One-time builds include 2 free revisions within 30 days of launch. After that, contact us for current revision rates or move to a monthly plan.
Yes. Monthly plans can be paused or cancelled. We'll confirm terms on your discovery call before you commit.
Book a free discovery call. We'll match you to the right tier based on your goals, timeline, and whether you need website, content, or both.
